LiDAR Processing Workflow

Kaden Ball

Load Required Libraries

# install.packages(c("lidR", "terra", "sf"))
library(lidR)
library(terra)
## terra 1.8.42
## 
## Attaching package: 'terra'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:lidR':
## 
##     area, crs, crs<-, is.empty, watershed
library(sf)
## Linking to GEOS 3.13.0, GDAL 3.8.5, PROJ 9.5.1; sf_use_s2() is TRUE
## 
## Attaching package: 'sf'
## The following object is masked from 'package:lidR':
## 
##     st_concave_hull

Load and Process LiDAR Data

las <- readLAS("data/export/Arboretum-10232024.las")

# Classify ground using csf() for robust terrain
las <- classify_ground(las, csf())

Create DEM with Reliable Interpolation

# Use knnidw for DEM generation to reduce empty areas
dem <- rasterize_terrain(las, res = 1, algorithm = knnidw(k = 10, p = 2))

threads)
## Warning: Interpolation of 25583 points failed because they are too far from
## ground points. Nearest neighbour was used but interpolation is weak for those
## points
writeRaster(dem, "DEM.tif", overwrite=TRUE)

Normalize Heights and Create DSM + CHM

# Normalize point cloud to ground
las_norm <- normalize_height(las, dem)

# Digital Surface Model from first returns
dsm <- rasterize_canopy(las, res = 1, algorithm = p2r())

# Canopy Height Model from normalized points
chm <- rasterize_canopy(las_norm, res = 1, algorithm = p2r())

writeRaster(dsm, "DSM.tif", overwrite=TRUE)
writeRaster(chm, "CHM.tif", overwrite=TRUE)

Visualizations

plot(dem, main="Digital Elevation Model")

plot(dsm, main="Digital Surface Model")

plot(chm, main="Canopy Height Model")
